description: LLM-draft calibration cases for similarity thresholds. These labels were produced by Codex from excerpts and scores, not by human scholarly validation; use for provisional technical calibration only.
annotation_warning: Do not claim human-validated calibrated thresholds from this file. Replace or confirm with at least 30 positive and 30 negative human annotations before publication claims.

case_format.label: positive or negative
case_format.expected_type: duplicate, clause_reuse, semantic_kin, translation, weak_link, similar_to, same_instrument_as, or null for negative

cases.label: positive
